LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Obrany Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Whitespring vojnové riešenia
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Postavte si prezidentskú výzdobu, ako sú koberce Whitespring, zrkadlá, veľké stoličky, dosky Whitespring, svietniky a ďalšie.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: prezidentská výzdoba
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Postavte si prezidentskú stoličku vhodnú pre vysokých predstaviteľov Whitespring a ich slávnostné povinnosti.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: prezidentské kreslo
